title: Google donates Agent Payments Protocol to FIDO Alliance
description: Google donates the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) to the FIDO Alliance to help secure the evolution of AI-driven commerce.

title: Google Wallet adds Aadhaar support in India, expands digital IDs to more countries
description: Consumers in India can now save their Aadhaar Verifiable Credentials in Google Wallet and digital IDs expand to more countries.

title: Google and Kaggle’s GenAI Intensive Vibe Coding course 2026
description: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

title: How to use Gemini to tackle your spring cleaning list

title: Fitbit’s personal health coach is now more customized

title: Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
description: Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs. This facility …
